attributes.description: Fleet-level host health: load, memory, network, process risk, and per-host non-idle CPU.
attributes.panelsJSON:
[{"type":"markdown","embeddableConfig":{"content":"## [System Host OTel] Overview

This dashboard is the fleet view for OpenTelemetry host metrics. It highlights the signals that most often drive incidents.
- CPU non-idle share and all three load averages over time
- Memory use ratio and network byte throughput with direction
- Hosts versus non-idle share and TCP connection state mix
- Network error and drop rates plus disk and process risk indicators","hide_title":true,"settings":{"open_links_in_new_tab":true}},"panelIndex":"aa7de78a-758f-496b-9932-5166daecec6a","gridData":{"x":0,"y":0,"w":16,"h":8,"i":"aa7de78a-758f-496b-9932-5166daecec6a"}},{"type":"vis","embeddableConfig":{"title":"KPI Load 1m","hide_title":true,"attributes":{"visualizationType":"lnsMetric","title":"","references":[],"state":{"datasourceStates":{"textBased":{"layers":{"layer_0":{"index":"metrics-hostmetricsreceiver.otel-*-a5054c6504c49b8e50d4e940111cec7fe28ec3649cc665afef0dddf2a4fe2761","query":{"esql":"TS metrics-hostmetricsreceiver.otel-*
